notes: Prong C: Subject x Benchmark cross-table lookup. (s,b) cell smoothed toward subject mean (n_prior=3.0) -> subject mean smoothed by 0.1 toward global -> global. If any leaderboard benchmark overlaps training, the (s,b) cell adds per-domain signal beyond subject mean. If fully cold-start (no overlap), collapses to subject mean (= sub 21).
